prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body shot, a young Japanese male character standing centered on pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words. Anime style, Japanese animation style, vibrant colors. The character is Light Yagami, a handsome young man with an extremely high IQ, physical fitness, and charisma. He has perfectly styled brown short hair. His face is strikingly handsome with sharp, intelligent, and deep-set eyes that convey a cold, calculating, and calm expression. His features are symmetrical and refined, exuding a noble, princely aura. He has a tall, upright, and well-proportioned physique. He is wearing a standard Japanese high school male uniform: a dark blue gakuran jacket with golden buttons over a white dress shirt, paired with matching dark blue trousers. His posture is confident and poised. In one hand, he holds a closed, black, notebook-like object (the Death Note), his grip firm and deliberate. The overall atmosphere is serious and intellectual, fitting for a logical推理 game theme involving supernatural power and moral philosophy., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
